response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong JS/TS and DLang depth, but the role demands deep Java/Kotlin/JVM expertise and hands-on Spring ecosystem experience, which the resume does not substantiate. Java appears only briefly (robotic arms, mobile orchestration) with no Kotlin, Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate work, and there is limited IDE-internals exposure beyond a short C/C++ stint on LabWindows/CVI a decade ago. Seniority and systems breadth are there, but the specific JVM/enterprise-framework focus is a significant mismatch.
strengths: Senior-level experience across complex, large-scale systems and tooling
Some IDE/dev-tooling exposure (LabWindows/CVI in C/C++, MCP code generators)
Strong engineering practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testability focus
concerns: No demonstrated Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate or enterprise-Java framework experience
Kotlin not listed; Java usage is peripheral and dated
Primary recent stacks (TypeScript/Node, DLang) are orthogonal to JVM IDE tooling
